remarks: Now offering 1 MONTH FREE with a one-year lease a significant savings opportunity on an already exceptional value. 1,668 sq. ft. of One-Level Living in This 3-Bedroom, 2.5-Bath Apartment Designed for Modern Living. This expansive residence at The Wilton Center Lofts offers a unique opportunity for elevated, contemporary living, featuring a HUGE private deck accessible from both the primary bedroom and main living spaces. Excellent commuter location-just a seven-minute walk to the Metro-North train and a three-minute drive. This thoughtfully designed 1,668-square-foot home was architecturally and interior designed by the award-winning Granoff Architects, showcasing top-tier finishes and timeless style throughout. The apartment boasts 9-foot ceilings and oversized, light-filled windows, creating a bright and open atmosphere. The gourmet kitchen is equipped with quartz countertops, stainless steel BOSCH appliances, custom cabinetry, and premium fixtures. Wood-grain flooring flows throughout the home, complementing the luxurious bathrooms. Large walk-in closets and an in-unit washer and dryer provide everyday comfort and convenience. Residents enjoy access to a fitness center, tenant lounge, covered parking, and available storage units, further enhancing the lifestyle experience. Furry friends are welcome. This exceptional one-level residence delivers modern luxury, intelligent design, and long-term value-ideal for professionals seeking quality living without compromise.
